english: Radiant as the Japa flower, son of Kashyapa, of great splendour
The enemy of darkness, destroyer of all sins — I bow to the Sun
roman: Tamorim sarva papaghnam pranato asmi Divakaram

english: White as curd, conch and snow, born from the milk ocean
I bow to the Moon, Soma, who adorns the crown of Shambhu
roman: Namami shashinam Somam Shambhor mukuta bhushanam

english: Born from the womb of the earth, with the brilliance of lightning
roman: Dharani garbha sambhutam vidyut kanti samap rabham

english: The ever-young one bearing a spear — I bow to Mars (Mangal)
roman: Kumaram shakti hastam tam Mangalam pranamamyaham

english: Dark as the Priyanghu bud, unrivalled in beauty — Mercury (Budha)
roman: Priya ngu kalika shyamam rupenaa pratimam Budham

english: The gentle, endowed with gentle qualities — I bow to Mercury
roman: Saumyam saumya gunopaetam tam Budham pranamamyaham

hindi: देवानां च ऋषीणां च गुरुं काञ्चनसन्निभम्।
english: Guru of gods and sages, golden in hue
roman: Devanam cha rishinam cha gurum kanchana sannibham

english: The intelligent one, lord of three worlds — I bow to Jupiter (Brihaspati)
Resembling collyrium in hue, son of the Sun, elder brother of Yama
Born of Chhaya and the Sun — I bow to Saturn (Shanaishchara)
roman: Chhaya Martanda sambhutam tam namami Shanaishcharam
